title: seseli libanotis subsp. japonicum
intro: Seseli libanotis subsp. japonicum, also known as Japanese mountain caraway, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carrot family that is native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Seseli libanotis subsp. japonicum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
